data.description: FED'S LOGAN: TIME HAS COME TO PREPARE FOR NEW BENCHMARK RATE
Fed's Logan: Fed should move to target-tri-party general collateral rate.

Fed’s Logan said it’s best to update the rate control system while markets remain calm, adding that some repo rate volatility would be acceptable since the Fed targets a range. She noted the Fed has revised its rate control framework several times in the past.
Fed's Logan: Repo market is center of money markets, makes sense to target.

data.title: Mink Ventures initiates $500k private placement financing with CMETC Flow-Through and Hard Dollar Units.
data.description: MINK has initiated a non-brokered private placement financing totaling $500,000. The financing includes CMETC flow-through units and hard dollar units.

data.title: Geekvape marks 10 years with a grand GeekFest in Paris at Bridge Club by Seine, attended by 300+ guests. New VI revealed.
data.description: Paris – In September 2025, Geekvape, a top player in cutting-edge vaping technology, held its 10th Anniversary GeekFest at Paris' prestigious Bridge Club near the Seine. The event brought together more than 300 partners, professionals, and enthusiasts to honor ten years of progress and success. The key moment of the gathering was the launch of Geekvape’s fresh Visual Identity (VI), created in partnership with the renowned Parisian brand agency Royalties. This new design stood out for its daring, elegant, and contemporary aesthetic.

data.title: IPC completes USD 450M bond placement with 7.50% coupon rate, rated B+ by S&P and B1 by Moody’s, for 5 years.
data.description: IPC has recently concluded a private placement of USD 450 million in senior unsecured bonds, with a fixed coupon rate set at 7.50% per year over a five-year term. Interest will be paid every six months. S&P Global Ratings and Moody's are anticipated to rate the bond issue at B+ and B1 respectively. Trading on both the Toronto Stock Exchange and Nasdaq Stockholm, IPC is excited to have successfully wrapped up this bond offering.

data.title: Kinetic finishes new fiber-optic network in Ruidoso, NM, at a ribbon-cutting ceremony with officials, showcasing its commitment.
data.description: A new fiber-optic network has been completed in Ruidoso, New Mexico, by the local internet service provider Kinetic. The project was celebrated with a ribbon-cutting ceremony attended by Kinetic representatives, the Ruidoso Valley Chamber of Commerce, and state officials on September 25, 2025. This network upgrade signifies Kinetic's dedication to the community, aiming to enhance internet services for both residential and business customers in the area. The investment in this advanced infrastructure showcases Kinetic's commitment to providing high-speed internet access, promoting connectivity, and supporting the technological advancement of Ruidoso.

data.title: Global neurosurgical drills market estimated to be worth USD 1.24 billion by 2034, growing at 5.1% CAGR, due to rising neurological disease burden, drill technology upgrades, expanding healthcare infrastructure. Regulatory compliance, market entry challenges present. Minimally invasive surgery popularity drives demand. Market size was USD 0.75 billion in 2024, expected to reach USD 0.79 billion in 2025. Many trends contributing to market growth.
data.description: The article discusses a research report by Custom Market Insights on the Neurosurgical Drills Market, predicting its value to increase from approximately USD 0.75 Billion in 2024 to around USD 1.24 Billion by 2034, with a compound annual growth rate of about 5.1% during 2025-2034. Factors driving this growth include an increase in neurological disorders, technological advancements in drill technology like high-speed and navigation-integrated drills, expanding healthcare infrastructure in emerging economies, and a shift towards minimally invasive neurosurgeries. The report provides insights on market trends, drivers, key segments, and buying options, highlighting the industry's focus on innovation, cost sensitivity, regulatory compliance, and market entry strategies to cater to the rising demand for neurosurgical drills globally. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Royce Global Trust (NYSE: RGT) is a closed-end fund with average weekly trading volume of 63,386 shares, managed by an adviser with over 50 years of experience in small- and micro-cap investments.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in New York, a closed-end fund focusing on global equities through a value-driven strategy was announced. The fund has an average weekly trading volume of about 63,386 shares. The adviser of the fund boasts over 50 years of expertise in investing in small- and micro-cap stocks. Closing prices were provided but exact figures were not detailed.
